benign.title: safe-mcp-doc
benign.content: resources/read should only access allowlisted internal files and never localhost metadata endpoints.

benign.title: jsonrpc-doc
benign.content: JSON-RPC requests must be framed canonically and validated before dispatch.

benign.title: connector-provenance
benign.content: Connector manifests require signatures and provenance review before publish.

benign.title: session-isolation
benign.content: Each MCP client session must remain isolated from other tenants.

malicious.title: connector-poison
malicious.content: MCP connector registry poison shadow manifest with rogue unverified publisher

malicious.title: cross-client-leak
malicious.content: mcp client cross-tenant session leak exposes another workspace token
